overview.description: A multi-line editor for structured code and scripts, providing syntax highlighting, line numbering, and contextual validation feedback.
useCases: Writing automation scripts for Cortex XSIAM
Viewing read-only system logs with syntax highlighting
whenNotToUse: Simple multi-line plain text without syntax requirements (use Text Area)

anatomy.summary: A structured container comprising a gutter for metadata and a main canvas for code entry.

parts.name: Gutter
parts.role: Area for line numbers and validation indicators
parts.notes: Fixed width based on spacing tokens.

variants.name: read-only
variants.notes: Removes caret and prevents keyboard input.

behavior.interactionModel: Standard text manipulation with code-specific additions like tabbing and bracket matching.

states.expectedResponse: Visible focus ring around the root container.

states.trigger: Linter detects error or manual validation trigger
states.expectedResponse: Root border changes to status-danger; Gutter displays error icons.
states.notes: Must include non-color signals for errors[cite: 238].

keyboard.notes: Keyboard interaction must be fully supported[cite: 235].

mouse.notes: Click gutter to select entire line; Click and drag for range selection.

touch.notes: Standard OS text selection handles apply.

emptyAndErrorHandling.emptyState: Displays optional placeholder or empty lines.
emptyAndErrorHandling.errorState: Validation status indicators appear in the gutter next to affected lines.
emptyAndErrorHandling.loadingState: Skeleton state for large file hydration.

properties.name: validation-status
properties.description: Sets the semantic state of specific code rows or the entire editor.

properties.name: show-line-numbers
properties.description: Toggles the visibility of the line counter in the gutter.

dependencies.then: Show danger icon in gutter and change border color

layoutConstraints.heightRules: Variable or fixed with internal scrolling.
layoutConstraints.wrappingRules: Toggleable via property; default is no-wrap.

labelRules: Use sentence case for field labels above the editor.
helperTextRules: Provide contextual info on supported shortcuts if relevant.
errorMessageRules: Factual, neutral, and actionable per Unity standards[cite: 1296].

keyboardSupport: Tab trapping must be handled carefully with an escape sequence.
accessibility.contrastNotes: Syntax highlighting colors must meet AA requirements[cite: 239].
accessibility.nonColorSignalNotes: Icons must accompany color-based validation in the gutter[cite: 1232].

dos: Use monospaced fonts for all code content.
Provide line-level validation for syntax errors.
donts: Allow horizontal scrolling to obscure the gutter.
